html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival

The Corny Slush can be crafted from the Prize Booth at a cost of 12 Prize Tickets. After eaten, it will cool down the player's temperature by 40 for 15 seconds.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival
Corny Slush
"Surprisingly refreshing!"
Food Info
9.4
0
5
Veggie
Object Info
Perk
Lower the player's temperature.
3 Days
40
Crafting
×12
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalfood_corntea"
“Is this drink supposed to be crunchy?”
–Wilson
“It keeps getting stuck in my teeth.”
–Willow
“Is cold corny sludge.”
–Wolfgang
“Oh. There really is corn in it...”
–Wendy
“THIS IS COLD SOUP”
–WX-78
“An acquired taste, but nevertheless quite refreshing.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hm. Chunky.”
–Woodie
“Surely you're not serious?”
–Maxwell
“Nay.”
–Wigfrid
“Is Ms. Wickerbottom trying to trick us into eating our vegetables again?”
–Webber
“It really shouldn't work, yet somehow it does...”
–Warly
“Mmmm”
–Wormwood
“Err... refreshing...?”
–Winona
“I think I'll go find a nice refreshing soul instead.”
–Wortox
“Mmm! Want more!”
–Wurt
“Yum...?”
–Walter
“The taste is alright, but the texture...”
–Wanda
The Corny Slush can be crafted from the Prize Booth at a cost of 12 Prize Tickets. After eaten, it will cool down the player's temperature by 40 for 15 seconds.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Corny Slush có thể được chế tạo từ Quầy Giải thưởng với chi phí là 12 Vé Giải thưởng. Sau khi ăn, nó sẽ hạ nhiệt độ của người chơi xuống 40 trong 15 giây.
title: Corny Slush
